content: W3C PNG Third Edition: cHRM, gAMA, iCCP, and sRGB are singleton ancillary chunks that precede PLTE and IDAT. Color precedence is cICP, iCCP, sRGB, then cHRM+gAMA; iCCP and sRGB together are discouraged and at most one embedded profile is recommended. Validate structure, length, and defined fields; preserve semantic metadata or return an explicit unsupported-colour-management outcome.
